overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a white lab coat walking through a futuristic industrial medical facility. The character moves from a narrow corridor through a waiting area with orange chairs into a laboratory workspace with computer equipment, approaching another character standing by a desk.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical facility waiting area with seating

events.description: character walks through archway doorway from corridor into the waiting room
character passes by the seated NPC and continues toward the laboratory area

agents.ego_description: walking forward through a doorway arch into a medical waiting area, moving toward the laboratory space beyond

notable_agents.action: seated in an orange chair with arms crossed, observing the player character passing by

entered.detail: rounded metal archway marking the entrance to the medical facility room
row of orange chairs against the right wall where an NPC is seated
white medical equipment and supply racks visible in the background
tall white storage cabinets lining the left wall of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character entering a medical facility through a rounded archway. The space is a narrow waiting area with orange chairs on the right where an NPC sits with arms crossed. Medical equipment racks are visible in the background as the character walks forward through the artificially lit, industrial-style corridor.

events.description: character enters the main laboratory area from the waiting room, approaching a desk with monitors
character slows approach while moving toward the standing NPC near the desk

agents.ego_description: walking through the laboratory space toward a standing figure positioned near a desk with computer monitors

notable_agents.action: standing by a laboratory desk holding a tablet, facing the approaching player character

entered.detail: large desk with equipment and monitors serving as the main workspace in the lab
multiple display screens and control panels on the right side of the room
transparent glass walls with metal frames separating lab sections on the left

segments.scene_description: The character enters the main laboratory workspace, leaving the waiting area behind. The room features a central laboratory workstation with computer monitor arrays on the right and glass partition walls on the left. A standing NPC waits near the desk holding a tablet as the character approaches through the industrial medical facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, industrial waiting area into a spacious, high-tech laboratory workspace. It begins as the character passes through a rounded archway into a corridor lined with orange chairs and medical equipment racks, passing a seated NPC with crossed arms. As the character walks forward through the artificially lit space, the narrow corridor opens up and transitions into the main laboratory. The scene then expands to reveal a central workstation equipped with computer monitor arrays and glass partition walls. Finally, the camera follows the character as they approach a second NPC holding a tablet who stands waiting by a desk.
